case_title: WEIDNER, MARIA VS CARRILLO, LUIS E.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, LUIS E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEIDNER, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, LUIS E. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM STATING THAT DEFT. LUIS CARRILLO NO LONGER WORKS AT THERE ESTABLISHMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO LUIS CARRILLO RETURNED TO SENDER WITH NOTE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WEIDNER, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT CARRILLO, LUIS E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
